items.name: Pywel Legend
items.flavor: You’ve claimed every trophy. Your name will echo through Pywel’s history as the legendary explorer for venturing every path and conquering every challenge.
items.unlock: Earn all other trophies in Crimson Desert to unlock Platinum (no DLC required).

items.name: Novice Adventurer
items.flavor: Countless adventures await beyond the horizon.
items.unlock: Complete chapter 1 of main quests. Automatic story-related trophy, cannot be missed. Unlocks Chapter 1: The First Encounter – Sub-Chapter: Trace – Main Quest: Woman in White .

items.name: Master Camper
items.flavor: A safe haven now stands ready for you and your comrades.
items.unlock: Complete the activation of the camp at Howling Hill. Automatic story-related trophy, cannot be missed. Unlocks during Chapter 3 – Sub Chapter: Homestead – Main Quest: Familiar Curses .

items.name: Maze Pathfinder
items.flavor: Even the most tangled paths fail to lead you astray.
items.unlock: Complete all maze challenges. Challenge Guide 4 Mazes Challenges

items.name: Conqueror of Spires
items.flavor: Climbing ever higher has opened the way toward the skies above.
items.unlock: Complete all spire challenges. Challenge Guide 8 Spires Challenges

items.name: Navigator of the Stars
items.flavor: The constellations that illuminate Pywel have revealed their secrets.
items.unlock: Complete all constellation challenges. Challenge Guide

items.name: Master of Swords
items.flavor: Through discipline and mastery, you’ve earned the right to be called a true master of the blade.
items.unlock: Complete all sword challenges. Challenge Guide 6 Sword Challenges

items.name: Master of Shields
items.flavor: Your reputation for mastery in wielding shields has spread across the land.
items.unlock: Complete all shield challenges. Challenge Guide 6 Shield Challenges

items.name: Master of Bows
items.flavor: Arrows guided by the wind reflect mastery over the art of archery.
items.unlock: Complete all bow challenges. Challenge Guide 6 Bow Challenges

items.name: Master of Spears
items.flavor: All under the skies revere you as the master spearsman.
items.unlock: Complete all spear challenges. Challenge Guide 5 Spear Challenges

items.name: Master of Two-Handed Weapons
items.flavor: Warriors honor you for your strength and precision with two-handed weapons.
items.unlock: Complete all two-handed weapon challenges. Challenge Guide 6 Two-Handed Weapon Challenges

items.name: Master of Artillery
items.flavor: Artillery skill honed through practice makes your enemies mere measure of efficiency.
items.unlock: Complete all cannon challenges. Challenge Guide 5 Cannon Challenges

items.name: Master of Rapiers
items.flavor: Rapier mastery has carved a name recognized far and wide.
items.unlock: Complete all rapier and shield challenges. Challenge Guide 5 Rapier and Shield Challenges

items.name: Master of Firearms
items.flavor: Firearm expertise keeps your foes’ heads bowed in fear.
items.unlock: Complete all gun challenges. Challenge Guide 5 Gun Challenges

items.name: Relentless Warrior
items.flavor: Unwavering resolve has forged strength worthy of a relentless warrior.
items.unlock: Complete all training challenges. Challenge Guide 10 Training Challenges

items.name: Battlefield Conqueror
items.flavor: By sensing the rhythm of battle, you’ve learned to bend the battlefield to your will.
items.unlock: Complete all battle challenges. Challenge Guide 10 Battle Challenges

items.name: Brilliant Tactician
items.flavor: You’ve steered countless operations to success by reading the tide of battle.
items.unlock: Complete all operation challenges. Challenge Guide 10 Operation Challenges

items.name: The Golden Merchant
items.flavor: Astute trade and quick judgment have filled your coffers well.
items.unlock: Complete all trade challenges. Challenge Guide 5 Trade Challenges

items.name: Beast Slayer
items.flavor: You’ve defeated the beasts, bringing peace to Pywel.
items.unlock: Complete all New Power challenges. Challenge Guide

items.name: Shadowlord
items.flavor: Knowledge of the shadowed world reaches depths few have ever known.
items.unlock: Complete all Above the Law challenges. Challenge Guide 10 Above the Law Challenges

items.name: Lord of Honor
items.flavor: Your name is honored in every corner of the lands.
items.unlock: Complete all ‘Challenges and Changes’ Challenges (was called Greymane’s Vow challenges in older patches). Challenge Guide 9 Challenges and Changes Challenges (Greymane’s Vow)

items.name: Proud Returnee
items.flavor: Trials overcome have paved the way back home.
items.unlock: This is unlocked by relocating the Greymane Camp from Howling Hill to Pailune. First, you must finish Chapter 7 ( Main Quest: Time to Face Justice ). This unlocks the Faction Questline “Reconstructing Pailune” and a new camp opens up in Pailune. The remaining steps are currently unconfirmed but it’s believed to be from completing the “Reconstructing Pailune” questline (possibly requires the quests at Greymane camp too).

items.name: Pilgrim of Wonders
items.flavor: The hidden beauty of Pywel has been revealed.
items.unlock: Complete all secret place challenges. Challenge Guide 60 Secret Places

items.name: Puzzle Solver
items.flavor: Sharp insight now guides you through any riddle.
items.unlock: Complete all Ancient Ruins puzzle challenges. Challenge Guide 37 Ancient Ruins

items.name: Lightbringer
items.flavor: Shadow guided into light has restored the forgotten sanctums.
items.unlock: Complete all sanctum challenges. Challenge Guide 16 Sanctum Challenges

items.name: Grand Collector of Arms
items.flavor: All the weapons in the world are now in your hands.
items.unlock: Complete all special weapon challenges. Challenge Guide 10 Special Weapons Challenges

items.name: Tamer of Legends
items.flavor: Even the wildest horses yield to your steady guidance.
items.unlock: Complete all horse challenges. Challenge Guide 10 Horse Challenges

items.name: True Gamer
items.flavor: Claim victory in various minigames so no challenge dare rattle you.
items.unlock: Complete all minigame challenges (all 5 subcategories). Challenge Guide 2 Shooting 4 Test of Strength 5 Duel 3 Mind Games

items.name: Protector of Pailune
items.flavor: Freedom returned to Pailune after defeating the Black Bears and the Jackals.
items.unlock: Complete chapter 7 of main quests. Automatic story-related trophy, cannot be missed. Unlocks after Chapter 7: Homecoming – Sub Chapter: Twisted Fate – Main Quest: Time to Face Justice .

items.name: Ultimate Hunter
items.flavor: Success in diverse hunts has forged a hunter of legendary renown.
items.unlock: Complete all hunting challenges. Challenge Guide 11 Hunting Challenges

items.name: Natural Collector
items.flavor: Deeper understanding of Pywel’s nature enriches knowledge of life throughout the land.
items.unlock: Complete all life challenges. Challenge Guide 12 Life Challenges

items.name: Expert Storyteller
items.flavor: Every thread of Pywel’s narrative now forms a complete story.
items.unlock: Complete all main quests. Automatic story-related trophy, cannot be missed. Unlocks for finishing the main story. The game has 12 Chapters, a Prologue and Epilogue. For a list of all quests refer to Crimson Desert Walkthrough . This trophy unlocks after the first Epilogue Quest: A New Beginning.

items.name: Conqueror of the Abysses
items.flavor: Exploration of every abyss extends far into the depths of the world.
items.unlock: Complete all Abyss challenges. Challenge Guide

items.name: Expert Explorer
items.flavor: Revelation of every corner of Pywel brings the entire land into clear view.
items.unlock: Complete all exploration challenges (all 9 subcategories). Challenge Guide

items.name: Unvanquished Strategist
items.flavor: Command of battle’s momentum makes the entire field yours to orchestrate.
items.unlock: Complete all mastery challenges (all 10 subcategories). Challenge Guide 6 Sword 6 Shield 6 Bow 5 Spear 6 Two-Handed Weapon 5 Cannon 5 Rapier and Shield 5 Gun 10 Special Weapons 10 Horse
